title: PACIFIC POWER - 211info
text: PACIFIC POWER PACIFIC POWER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Electric service provider. Provides bill assistance and payment plans for customers experiencing financial hardships. Fields complaints and completes repairs. 825 NE Multnomah Street Suite 550 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (888) 221-7070 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Customer Service (888) 221-7070 Report Outages or Dangerous Conditions (877) 508-5088 Customer Service (888) 225-2611 Español INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Electric Service Connection/Repair Electric Service Providers Utility Bill Payment Plans Utility Service Complaints Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - BACKUP ELECTRIC POWER UTILITIES - OREGON LOW-INCOME DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - PUBLIC SAFETY POWER SHUTOFFS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
